'''dhayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:leastways|leastways]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-y-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leastways|leastways]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dhayate|dhayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhayatesher|dhayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhayatesherĂ«m|dhayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhayatero|dhayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhayateshĂ«|dhayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhayateshĂ«m|dhayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhayatero|gokidhayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhayateshĂ«|gokidhayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhayateshĂ«m|gokidhayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhayankerom|godhayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhayankeshĂ«|godhayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhayankeshĂ«m|godhayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhayankeya|godhayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhayaterom|dhayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhayatemu|dhayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhayateya|dhayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhayaterom|gokidhayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhayatemu|gokidhayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhayateya|gokidhayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhayayate|dhayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhayayatesher|dhayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhayayatesherĂ«m|dhayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhayayatero|dhayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhayayateshĂ«|dhayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhayayateshĂ«m|dhayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhayayatero|gokidhayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhayayateshĂ«|gokidhayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhayayateshĂ«m|gokidhayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhayayankerom|godhayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhayayankeshĂ«|godhayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhayayankeshĂ«m|godhayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhayayankeya|godhayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhayayaterom|dhayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhayayatemu|dhayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhayayateya|dhayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhayayaterom|gokidhayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhayayatemu|gokidhayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhayayateya|gokidhayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhĂŠyĂŠte|dhĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhĂŠyĂŠtesher|dhĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|dhĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠyĂŠtero|dhĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|dhĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|dhĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠyĂŠtero|gokidhĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokidhĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidhĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhĂŠyĂŠnkerom|godhĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|godhĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godhĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhĂŠyĂŠnkeya|godhĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠyĂŠterom|dhĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠyĂŠtemu|dhĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhĂŠyĂŠteya|dhĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠyĂŠterom|gokidhĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokidhĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠyĂŠteya|gokidhĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhafyafte|dhafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhafyaftesher|dhafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafyaftesherĂ«m|dhafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafyaftero|dhafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhafyafteshĂ«|dhafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafyafteshĂ«m|dhafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafyaftero|gokidhafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhafyafteshĂ«|gokidhafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafyafteshĂ«m|gokidhafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhafyafnkerom|godhafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhafyafnkeshĂ«|godhafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhafyafnkeshĂ«m|godhafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhafyafnkeya|godhafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafyafterom|dhafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafyaftemu|dhafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhafyafteya|dhafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafyafterom|gokidhafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafyaftemu|gokidhafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhafyafteya|gokidhafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
